main_menu: 👨‍💼 Main Menu Choose one of the buttons below:
security: 🛡️ Security Settings Here you can enable or disable all protection features:
welcome: 👋 Assalamu alaykum! Welcome to our group! 🌸 This group is for women only. For security purposes, you need to pass verification. Please enter your details correctly:
enter_name: 📝 1/3. Enter your full name: Example: Aziza Karimova
enter_phone: 📱 2/3. Share your phone number: Press the button below:
enter_photo: 📸 3/3. Send your selfie photo: Please send a recent selfie photo. This is required for group security.
verification_complete: 🎉 Thank you! Your information has been sent to the admin. It will be reviewed and you will be added to the group shortly. ⏳ Please wait...
waiting_approval: 📸 Your photo has been sent to the admin! ✅ Waiting for admin approval. ⏳ Please be patient...
approved: ✅ Congratulations! Your request has been approved by the admin. 🌸 Welcome!
approved_with_link: ✅ Congratulations! Your request has been approved by the admin. 🔗 One-time link: {link} 🌸 Welcome!
rejected: ❌ Unfortunately... Your request has been rejected by the admin. If you have questions, please contact the admin.
no_permission: ❌ Access denied! This command is for admins only.
only_owner: ❌ Only the group owner can perform this action!
antilink_warning: ⚠️ {name}, posting links and advertisements in the group is forbidden!
antibot_warning: 🤖 {name}, adding bots to the group is forbidden! Bot blocked.
antiswear_warning: 🚫 {name}, using profanity in the group is forbidden! ({warn}/{limit})
broadcast_text: 📢 Broadcast Message Send the text or photo to broadcast. It will be sent to all registered users. Cancel: /cancel
startup_message: 🚀 Bot started successfully! ✅ Bot is running 💾 Database: connected 👤 Owner: {owner_id}
help_text: 📋 Bot Commands: For Users: /start - Start the bot /help - Help For Admins: /panel - Admin panel /broadcast - Broadcast /stats - Statistics In Group: Bot automatically: • Deletes ads and links • Clears profanity • Blocks bots • Issues warnings
add_admin: ➕ Add Admin Send the Telegram ID of the new admin. You can get ID from @userinfobot. Cancel: /cancel
remove_admin: ➖ Remove Admin Send the ID of the admin you want to remove: {list} Cancel: /cancel
admin_added: ✅ Admin added! 👤 ID: {id} They can now use /panel.
admin_not_found: ❌ Admin not found or an error occurred.
name_short: ❌ Name is too short. Please enter your full name:
phone_invalid: ❌ Please use the button below to share your phone number.
photo_invalid:
❌ Please send only a photo (selfie).

Files, videos and other formats are not accepted.
choose_language: 🌐 Choose Language: Please select your preferred language:
security_category_title: 🛡️ Security section Enable or disable protection features:
start_welcome: 👋 Welcome, {name}! ✅ Language selected successfully. Bot automatically controls the group: • 🔐 Verification (name+phone+selfie) • 🚫 Anti-link & spam • 🤖 Anti-bot • 🤬 Anti-swear • 🚰 Anti-flood • 🧩 Captcha check • 🚨 Anti-raid protection • 📋 Rules & auto-reply Admin panel: /panel
